title: Swiss Peeler 3pc Set, Green, Red and Grey
features: 3 SUPER SHARP AND LIGHTWEIGHT POTATO PEELERS – with razor-sharp carbon steel blades to effortlessly whip the skins off potatoes, carrots, or apples in seconds so you can prep crispy roasties or chunky chips in less time and without any fuss

USEFUL POTATO EYE REMOVER – instead of over-peeling your potato to remove the eye, or using a paring knife to dangerously gouge it out, the veg peeler's potato eye remover safely pulls them out with a quick twist

PERFECT FOR LEFT OR RIGHT-HANDED COOKS – super light and easy to handle, these versatile vegetable peelers fit comfortably in the palm of either hand, making them the perfect speed peelers for both left and right-handed cooks to use with confidence

IDEAL FOR COOKS WITH LIMITED DEXTERITY – say goodbye to tedious peeling that can leave your hands feeling stiff and sore, and hello to a faster, more enjoyable cooking experience with these must-have Kuhn Rikon peelers that make light work of food prep

3 YEAR KUHN RIKON GUARANTEE – setting the benchmark for premium kitchen tools and gadgets that work, all Kuhn Rikon kitchen accessories are expertly designed in Switzerland and come with a 3 year guarantee so you can cook with confidence
description: Product Description COOK WITH CONFIDENCE Original Swiss Peeler (Set of 3), Green, Red, Grey All Kuhn Rikon products are designed in Switzerland with every attention to detail paid. We even design and develop our own production lines, and use state of the art computer technology to create cookware and kitchen accessories that meet the needs of all cooks. TRIED AND TESTED As Switzerland’s leading cookware manufacturer, we carefully check every product in our laboratory in Rikon. Only the highest quality kitchen tools and gadgets are given the Kuhn Rikon seal of approval. MADE IN SWITZERLAND Designed and manufactured by Kuhn Rikon, the Swiss cookware experts, so you can cook without compromise. Key Features 3 razor-sharp potato peelers Strong carbon steel blades Peels potatoes, carrots and apples quickly Super light and comfy to hold Integrated potato eye remover Designed for left or right-handed use Makes light work of peeling fruit and vegetables Made in our factory in Rikon, Switzerland since 1986 RAZOR-SHARP These potato peelers have carbon steel straight blades to perfectly skin fruits, vegetables and potatoes with precision. TIME-SAVING Say goodbye to tedious peeling - these super light vegetable peelers prep roast carrots or chunky chips fast. EASY GRIP Perfect for left or right-handed cooks, these fruit and veg peelers fit comfortably in the palm of either hand. REMOVES POTATO EYES A handy potato eye remover safely pulls them out with a quick twist, so no more over-peeling.
